samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>Implement a traffic light with red, yellow, green indicators and a pedestrian button. In normal traffic light operation, the east-west (EW) light should have a 60-clock cycle period, with 5 clock cycles of yellow and 10 clock cycles of red. The north-south (NS) light should have a 60-clock cycle period, with 5 clock cycles of yellow and 10 clock cycles of red. The period for the pedestrian signal should be the same for both the EW and NS lights, and it should be 10 clocks, as the pedestrian signal is only active for 5 clocks. If the pedestrian button is pressed, the EW light should be shortened to 10 clocks if the remaining green time is greater than 10 clocks, and the NS light should be shortened to 5 clocks if the remaining green time is greater than 5 clocks.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Request signal for allowing vehicles to pass.</input>
        <output id="red">Red output signal.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow output signal.</output>
        <output id="green">Green output signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="idle">Idle state.</enum>
        <enum id="s1_red">State 1 red.</enum>
        <enum id="s2_yellow">State 2 yellow.</enum>
        <enum id="s3_green">State 3 green.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="cnt" width_description="[7:0]">Counter.</reg>
            <reg id="state" width_description="[1:0]">State.</reg>
            <reg id="p_red">Next red.</reg>
            <reg id="p_yellow">Next yellow.</reg>
            <reg id="p_green">Next green.</reg>
            <always>
                <case>
                    <if expr="state==idle">
                        <assign expr="idle"/>
                        <assign expr="cnt=10"/>
                        <assign expr="state=s1_red"/>
                    </if>
                    <if expr="state==s1_red">
                        <assign expr="state=s2_yellow"/>
                        <if expr="cnt==3">
                            <assign expr="cnt=60"/>
                            <assign expr="state=s3_green"/>
                        </if>
                    </if>
                    <if expr="state==s2_yellow">
                        <assign expr="state=s1_red"/>
                        <if expr="cnt==3">
                            <assign expr="cnt=10"/>
                            <assign expr="state=s3_green"/>
                        </if>
                    </if>
                    <if expr="state==s3_green">
                        <assign expr="state=s2_yellow"/>
                        <if expr="cnt==3">
                            <assign expr="cnt=5"/>
                            <assign expr="state=s1_red"/>
                        </if>
                    </if>
                </case>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always>
                <if expr="!rst_n">
                    <assign expr="cnt=10"/>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <assign expr="cnt=cnt-1"/>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always>
                <if expr="!rst_n">
                    <assign expr="red=0"/>
                    <assign expr="yellow=0"/>
                    <assign expr="green=0"/>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <assign expr="red=p_red"/>
                    <assign expr="yellow=p_yellow"/>
                    <assign expr="green=p_green"/>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <if expr="state==idle">
            <assign expr="idle"/>
            <assign expr="cnt=10"/>
            <assign expr="state=s1_red"/>
        </if>
        <if expr="state==s1_red">
            <assign expr="state=s2_yellow"/>
            <if expr="cnt==3">
                <assign expr="cnt=60"/>
                <assign expr="state=s3_green"/>
            </if>
        </if>
        <if expr="state==s2_yellow">
            <assign expr="state=s1_red"/>
            <if expr="cnt==3">
                <assign expr="cnt=10"/>
                <assign expr="state=s3_green"/>
            </if>
        </if>
        <if expr="state==s3_green">
            <assign expr="state=s2_yellow"/>
            <if expr="cnt==3">
                <assign expr="cnt=5"/>
                <assign expr="state=s1_red"/>
            </if>
        </if>
    </task>
</module>
